function.name: delete_file_folder_with_permission
function.description: Propose files/folders to delete and let the user interactively confirm which ones are actually removed.

items.description: Array of paths or path objects to propose for deletion

commonErrors.solution: No permission to delete one or more items
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Check file permissions or use bash with sudo if needed

commonErrors.solution: File or directory is in use by another process
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Close any applications using the file and retry

commonErrors.solution: File or directory does not exist
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use find_files to locate the item before deletion
